install_notes: Several bundled skill files in this pack are 12-33 KB. They will be truncated if the install runner uses WebFetch (which caps around 30 KB and often lower). The install runner MUST fetch these files via bash + curl against raw.githubusercontent.com URLs or via the GitHub Contents API (with base64 decode), NOT WebFetch. Specifically the five files in skills/ over 10 KB: creative-strategy-engine.md (33 KB), visual-formats.md (31 KB), hook-tactics.md (18 KB), creative-mechanics.md (15 KB), brand-relevant-keywords.md (13 KB), hook-voice-patterns.md (12 KB), hook-writing.md (11 KB). Example fetch: bash -c 'curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Motion-Creative/runneth-apps/main/runneth-classic/skills/visual-formats.md > /agent/.agents/skills/visual-formats/SKILL.md'. If WebFetch is the only option available, fetch each file in multiple passes using offset/limit parameters and concatenate, or escalate to the user.
description: The deterministic, opinionated Runneth, packaged as a single installable use case. Nine upstream dependencies, eleven bundled Alysha craft skills, brain seed with theme classifier and per-theme chains plus Alysha framework supplements and Beta-specific references, an orchestrator that enforces a 12-theme chain and the Synthesis Gate, a 10-step setup that captures surface preference, winner-definition, integrations intent, watched brands, and customer voice before handing off to brand-audit, and a user.md sentinel encoding 11 voice and behavior rules engineered against the six failure modes from the Runneth 1.0 customer feedback dataset.

installs.purpose: Orchestrator skill — 12-theme classifier, per-theme chain runner, Synthesis Gate, surgical-edit router, Step 0 re-anchor
Setup skill — 10-step configuration conversation, runs once at install, re-invocable on demand
Foundation skill — brand identity, value prop, audience, positioning
Foundation skill — facts-only product specs from the brand site
Foundation skill — VOC across pain, desire, objection, comparison, use-case buckets
Foundation skill — search landscape and audience language
Foundation skill — competitor read with active-ad signal from motion inspo-creatives
Strategy spine — pain × persona × messaging-angle matrix across 5 awareness stages
Execution skill — structural patterns between hook and format (Implied Answer, Pattern Interrupt, etc.)
Execution skill — hook craft with 8 psychological triggers
Execution skill — 35 hook tactic types reference
Execution skill — native-feeling hook sentence templates
Execution skill — 45+ visual ad formats with stage and mechanic pairing
12-theme classification rules
Per-theme chain — analyze (performance, top/bottom, comparison)
Per-theme chain — concepting (ideas, directions, fresh angles)
Per-theme chain — briefing (Strategic, Assembly, Script paths)
Per-theme chain — creative_attributes (hooks, headlines, messaging angles, CTAs)
Per-theme chain — educate (why/how, principles)
Per-theme chain — feedback_qa (creative review and evaluation)
Per-theme chain — research (competitor strategy, audience research)
Alysha framework supplement — selling vs offering distinction
Alysha framework supplement — the 11 messaging lenses with stage fit
Alysha framework supplement — format-purpose-stage mapping
Alysha framework supplement — product foundation and competitive feature mapping
Beta benchmark supplement — 7 framings net-new to current Runneth's benchmark reference
Beta custom-conversion clarification flow — halt-and-ask gate on ambiguous conversion names

runtime_installs.trigger: At install time, before setup runs, so the rules are loaded for the setup conversation itself
runtime_installs.purpose: Append the 11 voice and behavior rules to /agent/user.md with sentinel guard for idempotent install
Add routing entries for the runneth-classic brain seed and per-workspace state

post_install.name: Install corpus-search
post_install.description: Brain-wide retrieval layer — the orchestrator's Step 0 re-anchor uses it for searches across the brain.

post_install.name: Install plan-mode
post_install.description: Plan-before-build enforcement — the orchestrator surfaces plans for user confirmation before executing chains.

post_install.name: Install self-iteration-loop
post_install.description: Grading layer that captures what worked and what didn't, feeds lessons back over time.

post_install.name: Install health-alerts
post_install.description: Notifies when tools or routines break. Production hygiene for any pack that runs background work.

post_install.name: Install building-integrations
post_install.description: Pairs with the integrations-intent file from Turn 4 of setup. When the customer later connects an integration, this skill uses the saved intent to scaffold it.

post_install.name: Install integration-capabilities-library
post_install.description: Nightly-refreshed sourced reference for every connected tool. Companion to building-integrations.

post_install.name: Install bootcamp
post_install.description: Motion 2026 Creative Strategy Bootcamp corpus — 13 sessions across weeks 1–7, summaries plus full transcripts. The orchestrator's educate chain reads bootcamp content via corpus-search.

post_install.name: Install performance-bundle
post_install.description: Meta-bundle that cascades to brand-audit, paid-strategy-audit, creative-deep-dive, and weekly-performance-deck. The full analysis stack. brand-audit specifically is required because setup-runneth-classic hands off to it in Turn 8.

post_install.name: Install competitor-intel
post_install.description: Weekly competitor scan capability. Pairs with the watched-brands list captured in Turn 5 of setup. Routine stays opt-in until the customer explicitly configures cadence.

post_install.name: Run runneth-classic setup
post_install.description: Phase 0 silent pre-discovery, then Phase 1 conversational onboarding. Surface preference, winner-definition + business mode, integrations inventory, watched brands, customer voice, optional uploads, hand off to brand-audit, closing handoff after brand-audit completes. Must run AFTER all upstream use-case installs complete so brand-audit (installed via performance-bundle) is available when Turn 8 hands off to it.

post_install.name: Closing handoff after brand-audit completes
post_install.description: After setup-runneth-classic hands off to brand-audit and brand-audit completes, surface post-install-intro.md to the user in chat as the closing message of the install sequence. Resolve {{persona}}, {{pain}}, and {{inspo_brand}} tokens using values captured during setup and the brand-audit strategy output.

changelog.notes: Drop team-member-memory and add-roles-permissions from the pack: removed from upstream_dependencies and their use-case-install actions removed from the post_install cascade (9 dependencies remain). Both use cases are hidden from the library while they're reworked, and the cascade must not install hidden use cases onto customer VMs — this also stops fresh installs from pulling the team-member-memory resolver whose Neon-to-daemon-DB swap is still in flight. Install order is otherwise unchanged; corpus-search now runs first. Teams add either one from the library once it's re-published.

Critical fix: upstream dependencies (bootcamp, performance-bundle, corpus-search, plan-mode, self-iteration-loop, team-member-memory, competitor-intel, health-alerts, add-roles-permissions, building-integrations, integration-capabilities-library) were declared in upstream_dependencies as metadata only and never actually installed. Test installs found the pack installing standalone with no dependencies. Mirrors performance-bundle's post_install pattern — each dependency gets an action: use-case-install entry in post_install, ordered so add-roles-permissions runs first for security scoping, brain/foundation use cases run next, bootcamp + performance-bundle install before setup-runneth-classic runs (Turn 8 of setup hands off to brand-audit which is cascaded by performance-bundle). 11 new post_install actions added before the setup-runneth-classic skill-invoke. setup runs only after all dependencies finish installing.

Add install_notes field explicitly telling the install runner to fetch large skill files via curl against raw.githubusercontent.com or the GitHub Contents API, not WebFetch. Test installs found the install agent rationalizing partial content from WebFetch truncation. Same bundled skill file sizes ship without issue in brand-audit and creative-deep-dive, so the fix is fetch-tool selection at install time, not pack content.

Initial release. Bundles eleven Alysha craft skills, the 12-theme orchestrator with per-theme chain definitions, four Alysha framework supplements (selling-vs-offering, messaging-lenses, format-by-purpose, product-foundation), two Beta-specific reference supplements (benchmark priors, custom-conversion clarification), a 10-step setup conversation, and a user.md sentinel with eleven voice and behavior rules engineered against the six failure modes from the Runneth 1.0 customer feedback dataset. Declares 11 upstream dependencies (bootcamp, performance-bundle which cascades to brand-audit / paid-strategy-audit / creative-deep-dive / weekly-performance-deck, corpus-search, plan-mode, self-iteration-loop, team-member-memory, competitor-intel, health-alerts, add-roles-permissions, building-integrations, integration-capabilities-library). Apps and the dossier write logic are deferred to v1.1.
